# Extractor Receipt

## Summary

This source contains a comparative snapshot of AI coding agents, including published benchmark figures, usage telemetry, explicit no-data disclosures, and a caveat that different benchmarks measure different tasks.

## Evidence Files

### file: evidence-01.md
```markdown
---
version: evidence.v1
article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-01
kind: claim-support
citation: Benched.ai, Top Coding Agents (2025)
source_url: https://benched.ai/guides/top-coding-agents-2025
confidence: high
mechanism_relevance: none
contradiction_relevance: none
---
The guide states that its metrics are taken from first-party pages, blog posts, or repositories, and that tools with no released numbers are marked as having no official data.

## Source Excerpt

"All metrics are taken from first-party pages, blog posts, or repositories. Where a company has not released numbers, the table shows '— (no official data)'."

## Note

This is a methodological statement about how the comparison table was assembled.
```

### file: evidence-02.md
```markdown
---
version: evidence.v1
article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-02
kind: metric
citation: Benched.ai citing Anthropic Claude Opus 4 technical report, 2025-03
source_url: https://benched.ai/guides/top-coding-agents-2025
confidence: medium
mechanism_relevance: none
contradiction_relevance: none
---
Claude Code with Opus 4 is reported at 72.5% on SWE-bench Verified.

## Source Excerpt

"SWE-bench Verified 72.5 % (Opus 4)"

## Note

The figure is reported in this guide as a published benchmark value.
```

### file: evidence-03.md
```markdown
---
version: evidence.v1
article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-03
kind: metric
citation: Benched.ai citing Anthropic Claude Opus 4 technical report, 2025-03
source_url: https://benched.ai/guides/top-coding-agents-2025
confidence: medium
mechanism_relevance: none
contradiction_relevance: none
---
Claude Code with Opus 4 is reported at 43.2% on Terminal-bench.

## Source Excerpt

"Terminal-bench 43.2 %"

## Note

The source presents this as a separate benchmark from SWE-bench Verified.
```

### file: evidence-04.md
```markdown
---

---
Claude Code with Sonnet 3.5 is reported at 49% on SWE-bench Verified.

"Sonnet 3.5: 49 % SWE-bench Verified"

```

### file: evidence-05.md
```markdown
---

article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-05

### file: evidence-06.md
```markdown
---
version: evidence.v1
article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-06
kind: metric
citation: Benched.ai citing Cognition AI SWE-bench submission details, 2024-03
source_url: https://benched.ai/guides/top-coding-agents-2025
confidence: medium
mechanism_relevance: none
contradiction_relevance: none
---
Devin is reported at 13.86% on SWE-bench Verified end-to-end on a 25% subset.

## Source Excerpt

"SWE-bench Verified 13.86 % end-to-end on 25 % subset"

## Note

The source explicitly scopes this figure to a 25% subset.
```

### file: evidence-07.md
```markdown
---
version: evidence.v1
article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-07
kind: metric
citation: Benched.ai citing Cognition AI SWE-bench submission details, 2024-03
source_url: https://benched.ai/guides/top-coding-agents-2025
confidence: medium
mechanism_relevance: none
contradiction_relevance: none
---
The Devin entry states that the prior state of the art was 1.96%.

## Source Excerpt

"SWE-bench Verified 13.86 % end-to-end on 25 % subset – prior SOTA 1.96 %"

## Note

This prior-SOTA figure is presented within the same comparative claim as Devin's score.
```

### file: evidence-08.md
```markdown
---
version: evidence.v1
article_id: art-2026-03-21-013
evidence_id: evidence-08
kind: result
citation: Benched.ai citing Replit DebugBench leaderboard, 2025-02 snapshot
source_url: https://benched.ai/guides/top-coding-agents-2025
confidence: medium
mechanism_relevance: none
contradiction_relevance: tension
---
The Replit Agent + Code Repair 7B entry claims it outperforms GPT-4-Turbo and Claude Opus on Replit-repair and DebugBench, but says exact percentages were not published.

## Source Excerpt

"Outperforms GPT-4-Turbo, Claude Opus on Replit-repair & DebugBench; exact % not published, charts show top rank"

## Note

The comparative claim is qualitative because the source says exact percentages were not published.
```

```
